## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `cd projects && ./gradlew spotlessCheck` passes
- [ ] `cd projects && ./gradlew detekt` passes
- [ ] API changes: ran `./gradlew apiDump` and committed updated `api/` files
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if user-visible change
- [ ] `claude.md` Decision Log updated if an architectural decision was made
